title: Linear Systems, Spaces, and Transformations
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving coupled production and measurement systems. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible linear transformations computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate linear independence in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive basis dimension in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute matrix transformations in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
